---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behavior, verification gaps, or policy boundary failures
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Reproduction

List the exact steps, command, and configuration needed to reproduce it.

## Expected behavior

Describe what Ferrify should have done instead.

## Environment

- Ferrify version or commit:
- Rust toolchain:
- OS:

## Verification evidence

Paste relevant command output, receipts, or logs.

## Scope notes

List any `--in-scope`, `--out-of-scope`, or approval flags that mattered.
